title: github jcob-bd/notebooklm-mcp-cliを調べて、kernel/FUGUEに活用できるか検証せよ。/kernelで。
summary_text: Findings: - **Medium: NotebookLM intent is not mirrored into content labels, so label-based consumers can miss or misclassify NotebookLM routes.** In [route-task-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh#L358), skill/action label mapping only handles `slide/note/academic` families. Effects: - `notebooklm-visual-brief` gets no `content_action_label`. - `notebooklm-slide-prep` matches generic `*slide*` and is labeled `content:slide`, losing NotebookLM specificity. - Handoff fields are preserved, but observability/policy paths that read labels can drift. - **Missing coverage: `content_reason` passthrough is not asserted in workflow wiring test.** The value is passed in caller and implement workflows ([fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L873), [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L923)), but [test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh#L144) only asserts `content_hint_applied/action/skill` wiring, not `content_reason`. - **Missing coverage: no `route-task-handoff` test for NotebookLM slide-prep handoff path.** Current content test only checks visual brief ([test-route-task-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-route-task-handoff.sh#L168)); there is no parallel assertion for `notebooklm-slide-prep`. - **Missing coverage: `resolve-orchestration-context` tests do not assert `content_reason` outputs for NotebookLM paths.** NotebookLM action/skill are asserted ([test-resolve-orchestration-context.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L217)), but `content_reason` is never validated for natural-language detection or workflow-dispatch snapshot replay. Residual risk: - I could run `test-resolve-orchestration-context.sh` successfully (`34/34`), but `test-route-task-handoff.sh` and `test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh` could not be executed in this sandbox due `mktemp` permission denial, so those two were reviewed statically only.
